description: Richly hued penny loafer-referenced shoe with straps at the bridge, seamless toe cap and a refined stacked heel. Crafted with pure leather and fashioned to add panache to any dressy ensemble. Wear this with chinos and a polo T-shirt for a relaxed look, or with a suit to create a sophisticated impression.UpperLeather upper with slip on styling and reinforced overlay at the heel collarA leather strap across the midfoot Padded leather liningSoft sockliner for instep comfortPadded tongueMidsoleShock absorbing EVA midsoleOutsoleTPR outsole with a stacked heelTextured grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
